text: ideate how we can reach ASI (make AI autonomously work towards ideas by using the aim graph and the wrapped agents)
description: ideate using aimparency. Cooperate with human to create aims. look at the stem, the largest aims.
reflection:
Added two new sub-aims from investigation:
- 25c7b4e9: Wire compressOldSessions into watchdog-service and implement LLM-based recursive compression of session summaries (addresses the TODO and integration gap).
- 073ea968: Improve backoff and add explicit circuit-breaker in supervisor-state + recovery that triggers auto-propose (addresses where 'retry ceiling' still appears despite schedule cap).

Committed both to Claude week 3 phase. Existing subs 654b56f9 (compression) and 2b1ef4a8 (circuit) now have more specific implementation children.

status.comment: Started ideation by creating sub-aims for supervisor improvements: recursive compression (ab0e7bfa), valueRationale impl (8025ab20), circuit-breaker for backoff (2b1ef4a8). Investigated code for ideas.
